---
title: "Interactivity"
date: "2026-07-13"
date_end: "2026-07-17"
---

::: {.callout-important title="ATTENTION!"}
For this week, you should choose **only one (1)** exercise from among Sessions 11, 12, 13, and 14. Do not do more unless you want extra credit.
:::

Again, there's no lesson for this. The only way to learn how to use `ggplotly()` and create dashboards with Quarto is to try them out in RStudio, not in a mini browser-based R session here.

So [head over to the exercise](/assignment/11-exercise.qmd) to get started!
